headline: How Ramp Visa (V) AI Bill‑Pay Deal Has Changed Its Embedded Payments Investment Story
summary: In late March 2026, Ramp announced it had expanded its partnership with Visa through a renewed multi‑year issuing agreement and deeper integration of AI agents to automate corporate bill pay and real‑time spending controls across large global organizations. This move, alongside Visa’s recent work in subscription management and privacy‑preserving blockchain infrastructure, underscores how its network is becoming an embedded layer inside emerging fintech and enterprise payment workflows rather...
